steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is D, $55{x}^{2}$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Both terms have $x^2$, so add their coefficients:
$$50x^2+5x^2=(50+5)x^2=55x^2$$

steps.title: Test each choice
steps.content:
• A) $250x^2$: would come from multiplying $50 \times 5$, not adding. Eliminate.
  • B) $10x^2$: would come from $50/5$, not addition. Eliminate.
  • C) $45x^2$: would come from $50-5$, not addition. Eliminate.
  • D) $55x^2$: equals $50+5=55$ times $x^2$. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
